roadmap_result.summary: Personalized roadmap for **Full Stack Developer** | Level: Beginner | 16 skills to learn | ~11.9 months at 10.5h/week

phases.beginner: Variables, functions, DOM manipulation, events, ES6 basics
phases.intermediate: Async/await, fetch API, modules, closures, prototypes
phases.advanced: Design patterns, performance optimization, TypeScript migration

phase_plan.project: Build a weather app or quiz game with API integration

phases.beginner: Components, JSX, props, state, event handling
phases.intermediate: Hooks (useState, useEffect, useContext), React Router, forms
phases.advanced: Redux/Zustand, performance (memo, lazy), testing with Jest

phase_plan.project: Build a task manager or e-commerce product listing app

phases.beginner: Node.js basics, npm, modules, file system, HTTP module
phases.intermediate: Express.js, middleware, routing, REST APIs, authentication

phase_plan.project: Build a REST API with Express + JWT authentication

phases.beginner: SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, JOINs
phases.intermediate: Aggregations, GROUP BY, subqueries, window functions, indexes
phases.advanced: Query optimization, stored procedures, transactions, normalization

phase_plan.project: Analyze a public dataset (e.g., Netflix, COVID) with SQL queries

phases.beginner: init, add, commit, push, pull, clone, status
phases.intermediate: Branching, merging, rebasing, pull requests, resolving conflicts
phases.advanced: Git hooks, workflows (GitFlow), CI/CD integration, monorepo strategies

phase_plan.project: Contribute to an open-source project on GitHub

phases.beginner: Types, interfaces, enums, type inference, tsconfig basics
phases.intermediate: Generics, utility types, decorators, strict mode
phases.advanced: Advanced generics, conditional types, module augmentation

phase_plan.project: Rewrite a JavaScript project in TypeScript

phases.beginner: Learn fundamentals through official documentation and beginner tutorials
phases.intermediate: Build small projects and follow structured courses on Udemy/Coursera
phases.advanced: Contribute to open source, build portfolio projects, get certified

phase_plan.project: Build a small project applying this skill end-to-end

phases.beginner: Containers vs VMs, Docker CLI, Dockerfile, images, containers
phases.intermediate: Docker Compose, volumes, networking, multi-container apps
phases.advanced: Multi-stage builds, Docker Swarm, security scanning, CI/CD integration

phase_plan.project: Containerize a Python Flask/FastAPI app with Docker Compose

phases.beginner: Setup, psql CLI, basic CRUD, data types
phases.intermediate: Indexes, foreign keys, transactions, views, functions
phases.advanced: Query optimization, EXPLAIN ANALYZE, partitioning, replication

phase_plan.project: Design and query a relational database for a real app

phases.beginner: Variables, data types, loops, functions, lists, dicts
phases.intermediate: OOP, file I/O, error handling, modules, virtual envs

phase_plan.project: Build a CLI task manager or web scraper

tips: 📅 Study 10.5 hours/week consistently — daily practice beats weekend cramming.
🎯 Focus on one skill at a time. Complete each phase before moving on.
🛠️ Build the mini-project at the end of each skill — it cements your learning.
📊 Track your progress weekly and adjust your plan if needed.
⚠️ Your deadline (3 months) may be tight. Estimated time needed: 11.9 months. Consider increasing study hours or reducing scope.
💰 All recommended resources are free. Kaggle, freeCodeCamp, and YouTube are your best friends.
